blocks.headline: A sharper cut, every single visit
blocks.sub: Sharp & Co. is a traditional barbershop for the modern gentleman — skin fades, hot-towel shaves, and beard work by barbers who actually listen. Walk out looking like the best version of yourself.

items.d: A full consultation, precision cut, and styling finish tailored to your hair and your routine. $35 · about 45 minutes.
A classic straight-razor shave with hot towels, pre-shave oil, and a soothing balm. $30 · about 40 minutes.
Line-up, shape, and condition to keep your beard looking deliberate, not neglected. $20 · about 25 minutes.
Pick the cut, shave, or beard work you want — each shows the price and how long it takes.
Send your preferred date in the form below and we'll match you with the right barber.
We reply within a few hours to lock in your slot. No deposit, no fuss — just show up sharp.

blocks.html:
Request a booking

Tell us who you are and when you'd like to come in. We'll confirm by email.
blocks.css: .bk-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:64px 20px}.bk-card{width:100%;max-width:520px;padding:40px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.12);border-radius:6px;background:#fff}.bk-card h2{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:1.7rem}.bk-card p{margin:0 0 24px;opacity:.75}.bk-card form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}.bk-card label{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem}.bk-card input{padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:4px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:400;background:#fafafa}.bk-card button{margin-top:4px;padding:14px 22px;border:0;border-radius:4px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:#111;color:#fff}.bk-card button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}.bk-msg{margin:18px 0 0;min-height:1.2em;font-weight:600}.bk-msg.ok{color:#15803d}.bk-msg.err{color:#b91c1c}
blocks.js: (function(){var f=document.getElementById('bk-form');if(!f)return;var nameEl=document.getElementById('bk-name');var emailEl=document.getElementById('bk-email');var dateEl=document.getElementById('bk-date');var btn=document.getElementById('bk-submit');var msg=document.getElementById('bk-msg');f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var name=(nameEl.value||'').trim();var email=(emailEl.value||'').trim();var date=(dateEl.value||'').trim();msg.className='bk-msg';if(!name||!email||email.indexOf('@')<1||!date){msg.textContent='Please fill in your name, a valid email, and a date.';msg.className='bk-msg err';return;}btn.disabled=true;var orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='Sending…';fetch('/api/data/bookings',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({name:name,email:email,date:date})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad status');return r.json();}).then(function(){f.reset();msg.textContent='Booking requested! We\u2019ll email you to confirm your slot shortly.';msg.className='bk-msg ok';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;}).catch(function(){msg.textContent='Something went wrong. Please try again.';msg.className='bk-msg err';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;});});})();

blocks.text: © Sharp & Co. · 14 Market Street, Downtown · Tue–Sat 9–6 · (555) 987-6543
